iran_nuke.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 60% (up). Day 22 auto. 60% (stable). Day 22 Hour 04 UTC. Arad strike: 64 hospitalized, 10+ buildings damaged. Dimona 12mi from nuclear center. IDF Chief Zamir: 'war is not close to ending.' Natanz struck, Israel denies. IAEA no radiation leak. Trump 48hr ultimatum deadline ~22hrs (~00:53 CET Mar 24). Updated 2026-03-22T04:04:00Z

iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (up). Day 22 auto. 100% (stable). Day 22 Hour 04 UTC. Trump 48hr ultimatum active. Iran threatens ALL US energy infra if attacked. Houthis 'all options on table.' 140M barrel oil license granted. Zamir: 'war not close to ending.' Brent ~$112. Mixed: Trump wind-down rhetoric vs troop surge. Updated 2026-03-22T04:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: IRGC claims strikes on Kuwait and UAE air bases - ballistic missiles + suicide drones
latest_news.text: IRGC Navy commander Tangsiri claims 'pounded' Al-Minhad (UAE) and Ali Al-Salem (Kuwait) air bases with massive ballistic missile + suicide drone barrage. Says bases were 'origin of aggression' against Iran. UAE air defenses actively responding.

latest_news.headline: UAE air defenses responding to active missile threat
latest_news.text: UAE National Emergency Crisis and Disaster Management Authority confirms air defenses responding to missile threat. Tells residents to remain in safe locations. Direct threat to UAE territory escalates.

latest_news.headline: Putin tells Iran Moscow remains 'loyal friend and reliable partner'
latest_news.text: Putin's Nowruz message to new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei and President Pezeshkian: Moscow remains 'loyal friend and reliable partner to Tehran during this difficult time.' Major geopolitical alignment signal.

latest_news.headline: UK Foreign Secretary: Iran strikes on Gulf 'reckless' - wants 'swift resolution'
latest_news.text: UK Foreign Secretary Yvette Cooper calls Iran's Gulf strikes 'reckless', says UK wants 'swift resolution' and regional stability. Reiterates UK will offer defensive support but 'will not be drawn into wider conflict.'

latest_news.headline: Trump: Strait of Hormuz must be protected 'by other nations who use it'
latest_news.text: Trump says Hormuz protection should fall on 'other nations who use it' - further evidence of US disengagement from coalition-building for Hormuz. Pushes burden to Asian/European importers.

iran_conventional.syria_escalation_note: Monitoring. Israel strikes in Sweida province Syria continue. Potential for separate tracker if escalation widens.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 72% (up). Day 22 auto. 73% (stable). Day 22 Hour 04 UTC. 1,024 killed in Lebanon. Central Beirut strikes ongoing. 12 medical workers killed. Litani operations. IDF 450k mobilized. Updated 2026-03-22T04:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut - 7 neighborhoods evacuated
latest_news.text: Israeli military strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut early Saturday. Evacuation warnings for 7 neighborhoods in southern suburbs. Jets bombed Beirut at 3am. Ghandouriyeh house strike kills 1, wounds 2.

latest_news.headline: WaPo: Israel strikes Hezbollah health center, kills 12 medical workers
latest_news.text: Israeli strike hit Hezbollah-run health center in southern Lebanon, killed 12 medical workers. Israel widens campaign beyond fighters to civilian infrastructure.

turkey.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 23 Hour 03 UTC. No new incidents. 3 Patriot batteries at Incirlik. Stable. Updated 2026-03-22T03:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

india.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 3% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 23 Hour 03 UTC. No new developments. Stable. Updated 2026-03-22T03:04:00Z

russia.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 15% (up). Day 22 auto. 15% (stable). Day 22 Hour 04 UTC. Putin: Iran 'loyal friend.' Russia warns strikes on Natanz pose 'catastrophic risk.' No new NATO-Russia incidents. Updated 2026-03-22T04:04:00Z

china.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 5% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 23 Hour 03 UTC. Taiwan Strait stable. US-China trade talks in progress. No new PLA activity. Updated 2026-03-22T03:04:00Z

north_korea.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 23 Hour 03 UTC. Quiet since 10-missile salvo Mar 14. No new provocations. Updated 2026-03-22T03:04:00Z

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 42% (up). Day 22 auto. 43% (stable). Day 22 Hour 04 UTC. Deadliest day 2026 (1,610 Russian KIA). Moscow drone swarms. Peace talks paused due to Iran war. Spring offensive prep. Updated 2026-03-22T04:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Putin's forces suffer DEADLIEST day of 2026 - 1,610 killed in 24h
latest_news.text: Russian forces suffer deadliest day of 2026: 1,610 killed in past 24 hours. Total Russian casualties since Feb 2022 now approximately 1,285,700. Fighting intense despite peace talk pauses.

latest_news.headline: Ukrainian drone swarms target Moscow overnight
latest_news.text: Swarms of Ukrainian drones targeted Moscow overnight, mayor confirms. Russian air defense intercepted attacks. Continued deep-strike capability demonstration.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 29% (stable). Day 22 auto. 29% (stable). Day 22 Hour 04 UTC. Eid ceasefire holding through Mar 24. TTP also truce. Post-Eid resumption feared Mar 25. Updated 2026-03-22T04:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding, TTP also declares 3-day truce
latest_news.text: 5-day Eid ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. TTP separately declares 3-day ceasefire. Qatar welcomes truce. No fighting reported. Post-Eid resumption expected.

top_signals: TRUMP 48-HR ULTIMATUM: 'If Iran doesn't FULLY OPEN Strait of Hormuz within 48 HOURS, US will obliterate POWER PLANTS' (deadline ~00:53 CET Mar 24)
IDF CHIEF ZAMIR: 'War is not close to ending'
IRAN PARLIAMENT SPEAKER: Interceptors failed over Dimona = 'new phase. Israel's skies are defenceless.'
Arad strike: 64 hospitalized, 10+ buildings damaged, 3 at risk of collapse
Natanz nuclear facility STRUCK — Israel denies responsibility
Iran threatens ALL US energy infrastructure if Iranian power plants hit
Houthis: 'all options on the table' re: joining war against Israel/US
1,024 killed in Lebanon from Israeli strikes
Deadliest day 2026 in Ukraine: 1,610 Russian KIA
Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire to Mar 24 - post-Eid resumption feared
Russia warns Natanz strikes pose 'catastrophic disaster' risk across Middle East

new: CENTCOM: 8,000+ targets struck, 130 Iranian vessels destroyed
US shifts to Apache/A-10 close air support - degraded Iranian air defense
3,000+ vessels stranded at Strait of Hormuz (IMO)
Reuters: Iran war 'escalating beyond Trump's control'
Iran fires 2 IRBMs at Diego Garcia - one fails, one shot down
Natanz nuclear facility struck - Israel denies attack
Oil sanctions temporarily lifted on Iranian oil at sea
Iran allows Japanese ships Hormuz - bilateral passage deals
Trump: US considering 'winding down' Iran military operations
Russia preparing Spring-Summer 2026 offensive - intensifying mechanized assaults
changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: Day 22 Hour 18. DE-ESCALATION: Trump rhetoric winding down. Treasury lifts oil sanctions. Iran allows Japanese ships Hormuz. IAEA confirms no radiation at Natanz. Eid ceasefire Pakistan-Afghanistan. ESCALATION: 8000+ targets struck per CENTCOM. Iran fires at Diego Garcia (2370 miles from Iran). IRGC massive strikes UAE/Kuwait air bases. USS Boxer Marines deploying. 12 medical workers killed in Lebanon. Central Beirut strike kills 10. Russia preparing Spring-Summer offensive. Brent >$110. NET: War intensifying despite wind-down rhetoric. Iran demonstrates global strike capability.

latest_news.headline: Iran Parliament Speaker: interceptors failed over Dimona = 'new phase of conflict'
latest_news.text: Iranian Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf: 'If Israel is unable to intercept missiles in the heavily protected Dimona area, it is operationally a sign of entering a new phase of the conflict. Israel's skies are defenceless.'

latest_news.headline: Houthis say 'all options on the table' re: joining war against Israel and US
latest_news.text: Yemen's Houthis say 'all options are on the table' re: joining Iran in war. However, AP reports Houthi weapons stockpile running low after Gaza war. Stockpile disruption from Iran conflict further limits capacity.

latest_news.headline: Trump mixed messages: 'winding down' war but deploying MORE troops
latest_news.text: AP: Trump's contradictory Iran policy - says he's 'winding down' military operations while Pentagon deploys additional troops. Easing sanctions but adding forces. Mixed signals on endgame.

latest_news.headline: Netanyahu vows 'continued strikes on all fronts' after 'very difficult evening'
latest_news.text: Netanyahu: 'We are determined to continue striking our enemies on all fronts' after Iranian missiles hit Dimona and Arad. Contradicts Trump wind-down signals.

latest_news.headline: 1,024 now killed in Lebanon from Israeli strikes since March 2
latest_news.text: Lebanese authorities confirm 1,024 killed from Israeli strikes since war began March 2. 210+ Hezbollah rockets fired into Israel per UNIFIL.

outlook: IMMINENT (Day 22, 04:04 UTC). CRITICAL: Trump 48hr ultimatum deadline ~22hrs (~00:53 CET Mar 24). IDF Chief Zamir: 'war not close to ending.' Arad/Dimona strikes penetrate Israeli air defense — 'new phase' per Iran. Iran threatens ALL US energy infra if power plants hit. Houthis considering joining. NET: RECIPROCAL ESCALATION with ultimatum deadline approaching. No diplomatic off-ramps visible.
de_escalation_watch: Day 22 Hour 04. DE-ESCALATION: Trump 'winding down' rhetoric. 140M barrel oil license. Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire to Mar 24. IAEA no radiation at Natanz. ESCALATION: TRUMP 48-HR ULTIMATUM (deadline ~00:53 CET Mar 24). IDF Chief: 'war not close to ending.' Dimona/Arad intercept failure — 'new phase.' Iran threatens US/Israeli energy infra. Houthis 'all options on table.' 1,024 killed in Lebanon. NET: Military ops intensifying. Ultimatum approaching with no sign of compliance.
